message:
fix(clippy): pub(crate) → pub in workflow submodules (handlers, engine, runner, builtin)

- handlers.rs: pub for record_from_detection, AUTH_COOLDOWN_MS, AuthCassHintsLookup
  + fields, normalized_cass_query, build_recovery_prompt, classify_limit/quota,
  build_recovery_plan (x2), cooldown_ms fields on HandleClaudeCodeLimits/HandleGeminiQuota
- engine.rs: pub for redact_text_for_log
- runner.rs: pub for WorkflowRunner.engine field
- builtin_workflows.rs: pub for resolve_prompt, check_pane_guards

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
